layout.spacing: Dense, Control Room style (p-4 to p-6 padding inside containers)
layout.surfaceStrategy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look): Exposed skeleton, 1px borders (border-border), max 4px border-radius. No glassmorphism in data views.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges. Primary uses #00D4AA (Teal-Green) background with #0A0C10 text. Secondary uses #1A1E2A background with 1px border.
components.cards: Cardless or dense flat rectangular cards with 1px border (#272E3B). No shadows. Hover effect: Border color brightens, subtle translation (-translate-y-[1px]).
components.tables: Dense. Header rows use 11px uppercase tracking-wide text (#6B7A90). Rows have 1px bottom border. Use JetBrains Mono for IDs and metrics.
components.drawer: Right-side drawer (480px width), background #12151C, with 1px left border. Uses Shadcn Tabs for overview/events/commands/audit.
components.alertTicker: Running marquee (react-fast-marquee) at top or bottom for live alerts. Use JetBrains Mono for alert text.
components.charts: Recharts with transparent backgrounds, using Accent (#00D4AA) and Status colors for data lines.
components.connectorBuilder: Three-pane workspace. Middle pane is mapping canvas (use dot grid background `bg-[url('...')]` or SVG pattern).
components.aiStudio: Implement 'The Tracing Beam' edge animation (framer-motion) around the AI input prompt area.
components.sixLayerVisualization: Use a vertical stack of styled div containers with connecting lines (using borders or SVG) to represent the 6 layers of architecture.

motion.hover: Fast, precise (transition: all 0.15s ease). Text color MUST brighten on hover.
motion.transitions: Use 'Tracing Beam' for active states or AI processing.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast on #00D4AA is dark (#0A0C10) for readability.
accessibility.testIds: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based). Example: data-testid='device-row-click'.

icons.style: Regular or Light weight, matching text size.

abstract_background.description: Dark abstract close-up of illuminated geometric metallic shapes forming a pattern.
abstract_background.usage: Use as a very low-opacity (5-10%) background texture for the login screen or empty state backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use generic Inter font for headings; configure Chivo and IBM Plex Sans in Tailwind.
Strictly adhere to the provided color hex codes. Set the Tailwind config to use these exact values instead of default slate/zinc.
Implement the 12-column bento grid for the Estate Dashboard, using 'col-span-3', 'col-span-6', etc.
For the Device Management page, implement a data table on the left (spanning remaining columns) and the 480px Detail Drawer on the right upon row click.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout (sidebar, header, main content area) and heavily customized Shadcn components for complex interactions (Tabs, Dropdowns, Dialogs).
Make sure the right detail drawer has Tabs (Overview, Events, Commands, Connector, Audit).
Data-heavy widgets must use JetBrains Mono for numbers, IDs, and event logs.
Run: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react react-fast-marquee framer-motion recharts clsx tailwind-merge
